titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the William Joseph Griffin oral history interview, 1958.
Griffin, William Joseph oral history interview
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the William Joseph Griffin Oral History Interview,1958.
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.unittitle: William Joseph Griffin oral history interview,
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Reminiscences concerning Griffin's life as a lumber camp worker, sawmill operator, farmer, and maple syrup cooperative president, and concerning the hardships of his Irish immigrant parents in the 1840s and 1850s. Interview conducted by Charles D. Bonsted.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Reminiscences concerning Griffin's life as a lumber camp worker, sawmill operator, farmer, and maple syrup cooperative president, and concerning the hardships of his Irish immigrant parents in the 1840s and 1850s. Interview conducted by Charles D. Bonsted.

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial finding aid.

scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: William Joseph Griffin oral history interview, #1968. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
